User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Axénda application.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile image.

KanbanBoard.title: KanbanBoard
KanbanBoard.description: Represents a Kanban board for organizing tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kanban board.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this board. (Relationship: User 1:N KanbanBoard)

KanbanList.title: KanbanList
KanbanList.description: Represents a list within a Kanban board.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kanban list.

kanbanBoardId.description: Reference to the KanbanBoard this list belongs to. (Relationship: KanbanBoard 1:N KanbanList)

name.description: Name of the Kanban list (e.g., 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done').

order.description: The order of the list within the Kanban board. Lower values appear first.

KanbanCard.title: KanbanCard
KanbanCard.description: Represents a card within a Kanban list, representing a task.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kanban card.

kanbanListId.description: Reference to the KanbanList this card belongs to. (Relationship: KanbanList 1:N KanbanCard)

description.description: Description of the task represented by the card.

estimatedTime.description: Estimated time to complete the task, in hours.

effectiveTime.description: Effective time spent on the task, in hours.

categoryIds.description: References to Categories associated with this card. (Relationship: Category N:N KanbanCard)

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category for classifying Kanban cards.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created this category. (Relationship: User 1:N Category)

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment on a Kanban card.

kanbanCardId.description: Reference to the KanbanCard this comment belongs to. (Relationship: KanbanCard 1:N Comment)

userId.description: Reference to the User who wrote the comment. (Relationship: User 1:N Comment)

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the comment was created.

ChecklistItem.title: ChecklistItem
ChecklistItem.description: Represents an item in a checklist on a Kanban card.

id.description: Unique identifier for the checklist item.

kanbanCardId.description: Reference to the KanbanCard this checklist item belongs to. (Relationship: KanbanCard 1:N ChecklistItem)

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the checklist item is completed.

PomodoroSession.title: PomodoroSession
PomodoroSession.description: Represents a Pomodoro session for time management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Pomodoro session.

userId.description: Reference to the User who started this session. (Relationship: User 1:N PomodoroSession)

kanbanCardId.description: Reference to the KanbanCard this PomodoroSession is linked to. (Relationship: KanbanCard 1:N PomodoroSession)

startTime.description: Start time of the Pomodoro session.

endTime.description: End time of the Pomodoro session.

focusDuration.description: Duration of the focus period in minutes.

breakDuration.description: Duration of the break period in minutes.

category.description: Category of focus for the session (e.g., 'Study', 'Work', 'Self-care').

Reminder.title: Reminder
Reminder.description: Represents a reminder for a Kanban card.

kanbanCardId.description: Reference to the KanbanCard this reminder is associated with. (Relationship: KanbanCard 1:N Reminder)

reminderTime.description: Time when the reminder should be triggered.

CalendarEvent.title: CalendarEvent
CalendarEvent.description: Represents an event in the calendar.

id.description: Unique identifier for the calendar event.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created this event. (Relationship: User 1:N CalendarEvent)

startTime.description: Start time of the calendar event.

endTime.description: End time of the calendar event.

CulturalEvent.title: CulturalEvent
CulturalEvent.description: Represents an important date for the Black community.

id.description: Unique identifier for the cultural event.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  The 'userId' parameter identifies the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores Kanban boards owned by a specific user. The 'userId' parameter identifies the owner, and 'kanbanBoardId' identifies the board.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the board.

params.name: kanbanBoardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban board.

definition.description: Stores Kanban lists within a specific board. The 'userId' and 'kanbanBoardId' parameters identify the board, and 'kanbanListId' identifies the list.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the board.

params.name: kanbanBoardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban board.

params.name: kanbanListId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban list.

definition.description: Stores Kanban cards within a specific list. The 'userId', 'kanbanBoardId', and 'kanbanListId' parameters identify the list, and 'kanbanCardId' identifies the card.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the board.

params.name: kanbanBoardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban board.

params.name: kanbanListId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban list.

params.name: kanbanCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban card.

definition.description: Stores categories created by a specific user. The 'userId' parameter identifies the creator, and 'categoryId' identifies the category.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the category.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the category.

definition.description: Stores comments on a specific Kanban card. The 'userId', 'kanbanBoardId', 'kanbanListId', and 'kanbanCardId' parameters identify the card, and 'commentId' identifies the comment.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the board.

params.name: kanbanBoardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban board.

params.name: kanbanListId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban list.

params.name: kanbanCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban card.

params.name: commentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

definition.description: Stores checklist items for a specific Kanban card. The 'userId', 'kanbanBoardId', 'kanbanListId', and 'kanbanCardId' parameters identify the card, and 'checklistItemId' identifies the checklist item.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the board.

params.name: kanbanBoardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban board.

params.name: kanbanListId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban list.

params.name: kanbanCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban card.

params.name: checklistItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the checklist item.

definition.description: Stores Pomodoro sessions started by a specific user. The 'userId' parameter identifies the user, and 'pomodoroSessionId' identifies the session.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who started the session.

params.name: pomodoroSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Pomodoro session.

definition.description: Stores reminders for a specific Kanban card. The 'userId', 'kanbanBoardId', 'kanbanListId', and 'kanbanCardId' parameters identify the card, and 'reminderId' identifies the reminder.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the board.

params.name: kanbanBoardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban board.

params.name: kanbanListId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban list.

params.name: kanbanCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Kanban card.

params.name: reminderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the reminder.

definition.description: Stores calendar events created by a specific user. The 'userId' parameter identifies the creator, and 'calendarEventId' identifies the event.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the event.

params.name: calendarEventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the calendar event.

definition.description: Stores global cultural events. The 'culturalEventId' parameter identifies the event.

params.name: culturalEventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the cultural event.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to manage user data, Kanban boards, lists, cards, categories, comments, checklist items, Pomodoro sessions, reminders, calendar events, and cultural events for the Axénda application. The structure prioritizes authorization independence by denormalizing user IDs where necessary, particularly for entities nested under Kanban boards. This approach avoids the need for `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and simplifying security management.  

To support secure list operations (QAPs), the design implements Structural Segregation, ensuring that each collection contains documents with homogeneous security requirements. Private user data is stored under `/users/{userId}`, while collaborative data, if any, would use membership maps.  Since all Kanban related entities are owned by a user they are all nested under `/users/{userId}`.

Ownership is consistently modeled using hierarchical paths, such as `/users/{userId}/kanbanBoards/{kanbanBoardId}`, which clearly establishes the relationship between users and their Kanban boards. Nested entities like Kanban lists, cards, and comments follow a similar pattern, ensuring a clear ownership hierarchy and simplified security rules.

Cultural events are stored in a global collection `/culturalEvents` as these events are global and not specific to any particular user.
